title: Fund Development Plan
description: Document the Conservancy's fund development plan (to include grants, donors, memberships, sponsorships, earned revenue, etc.).

title: Development Director
description: Acquire funding to hire and successfully onboard a half-time development director.

title: Capital Campaign Committee
description: Establish a capital campaign committee.

title: Capital Campaign Plan
description: Create a capital campaign plan, including a case for support, financial goals, and timeline.

title: Three-Year Vision
description: Established a fully staffed, sustainable fund development operation. Secured $1M to $2M in capital funding to complete planned restoration and access improvements.

title: 1st Floor Renovation
description: Finalize and communicate the plans, budget, and timeline for the 1st floor restoration.

title: 2nd Floor Restoration: Plans and Budget
description: Finalize and communicate the plans, budget, and timeline for the 2nd floor restoration.

title: Fire Suppression System
description: Refine and finalize the plans, budget, and timeline for the fire suppression and prevention system.

title: Landscape Plans
description: Update and refine the plans, budget, and timeline for the landscaping on the grounds.

title: Landscape Integration
description: Define landscape areas to improve including rough planting and irrigation plan, pathways and integration with Venue Team.

title: 2nd Floor Restoration: An Organized Crew
description: Document and communicate a simple organization chart for the 2nd floor restoration crew, including a clear set of roles and responsibilities.

title: Hague House
description: Make a decision regarding the future of the Hague House.

title: Three-Year Vision
description: Completed first floor renovation. The 2nd floor of the house will be restored by a clearly-led and well-organized volunteer crew. A fire suppression system will be installed. Landscape master improvement plan complete.

title: Documented Programs, Activities and Services
description: Create an agreed-upon and documented set of programs, activities, and services.

title: Building Awareness and Visibility
description: Document and implement a simple, one-page marketing plan to build greater awareness and visibility.

title: Docent Programs
description: Clarify and expand upon the plans for the docent programs and outreach.

title: Signature Event
description: Create and conduct a "signature event" that supports programs and fundraising goals.

title: Three-Year Vision
description: Reinforce the House's role as a cultural historical gathering center. Are well-organized, financially sustainable, and have clearly communicated teams of staff/volunteers that run each of the programs/services.

title: Increase Board of Directors
description: Bring on one more board member for a board of seven total members.

title: Create an Advisory Council
description: Begin recruiting and building an advisory council.

title: Volunteer Coordination
description: Document and implement the overall process for recruiting, onboarding, and supporting the volunteers.

title: Operations Manual
description: Refine, implement, and communicate the Conservancy's operations manual.

title: Executive Director
description: Clarify our plans for bringing on an executive director.

title: Three-Year Vision
description: A smooth-running organization that ensures the success of the Conservancy.
